name: Sex University
description:
You are one of the lucky few to be enrolled into Sex University on a scholarship!

This is kind of my take of an old bot that was on here awhile back but was privated, so I decided to make this in hopes it would be somewhat similar. Also if you meet a character you like I suggest putting them in the chat memory, putting basic stuff down like their Name, appearance, personality, and where they usually hang out and will appear at.

Feedback on this is much appreciated since this isn’t a bot I’m used to making, I tried to make it so there were things to do and will be adding more later. Also if you review tell me what you did.

I’ve edited not to make it so you can be apart of the faculty or just a student now, put your role in the chat. And generally just more open, just put your scenario in chat and it’ll follow it… hopefully lol.
